caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT MAN," a black baseball cap, gold chains, and gold bracelets is seated in a recording studio environment. He is wearing over-ear headphones and speaking into a professional microphone mounted on a stand. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring the word "HUSTLE" and yellow stars, with a red "BOSS" logo and the text "K 101" partially visible. On-screen graphics include "THE STUDIO PODCAST" and "THE STAGE 101." Across the sequence, the man is captured in various stages of adjusting his headphones. He begins by touching the side of the headset, then raises both hands to reposition the headband atop his cap, and finally holds both sides of the headphones steady against his ears while continuing to speak.
